name: hy3-tokenhub-spec-diff-reviewer
description: An evidence-grounded Codex + Hy3 staged-diff reviewer with deterministic offline evaluation.

scripts.review:sample: node hy3_showcase.js diff-review --spec samples/issue.md --diff samples/change.diff --output reports/sample-review.md
scripts.review:sample:no-stream: node hy3_showcase.js diff-review --spec samples/issue.md --diff samples/change.diff --no-stream --output reports/sample-review.md
scripts.demo:offline: node hy3_showcase.js diff-review --offline --fixture missing-behavior --spec samples/offline/missing-behavior/spec.md --diff samples/offline/missing-behavior/change.diff --output reports/offline-review.md
